cipr_excellence_2026.name: CIPR Excellence Awards
cipr_excellence_2026.why_now: UK PR practitioner gold standard (42nd year); 145 orgs across 33 categories. Senior in-house comms judges + finalists = a direct relationship route.

communicate_ic_engagement_live_2026.name: Internal Communications & Engagement Live
communicate_ic_engagement_live_2026.why_now: One-day UK IC conference; delegates + speakers skew Head of IC / Director of IC at large UK employers.

ioic_awards_2026.name: IoIC Awards
ioic_awards_2026.why_now: Premier UK internal-comms awards. Finalists = visible Heads of IC and IC Directors at large UK employers.

icco_global_summit_2026.name: ICCO Global Summit
icco_global_summit_2026.why_now: International Communications Consultancy Organisation annual summit (11-13 Nov). Consultancy CEOs + senior in-house clients attend; relationship-building venue.

cipr_conference_2026.name: CIPR Annual Conference
cipr_conference_2026.why_now: Theme: Organisational Resilience. Speaker line-up is a tier-1 list of senior in-house comms leaders; pre-event outreach has a clear hook.

european_excellence_2026.name: European Excellence Awards
european_excellence_2026.why_now: Pan-EU comms awards. UK + EU CCO attendance; useful for European-headquartered briefs landing in London offices.
